meaning: n.课税,征税,抽税,税款,估定的税额
examples: Their policies on taxation didn't endear them to voters.
A number of simplifications have been made to the taxation system.
Taxation is not popular in principle, merely acceptable in context.
Mr Brown's speech was taken as a sign that he favoured more taxation powers for Holyrood.
You lock up your capital until retirement, but it is protected from double taxation.
